title: rinorea lanceolata var. floribunda
intro: Rinorea lanceolata var. floribunda, also known as the 'Rinorea' or 'Polypodium leucotomos,' is a plant species belonging to the family Violaceae. The medicinal properties of Rinorea lanceolata var. floribunda are primarily attributed to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and other skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Rinorea lanceolata var. floribunda is used in herbal preparations like capsules, tinctures, and creams, making it a popular ingredient in natural skincare products and supplements.
